# Product Architect Graph
## Overview
The Product Architect Graph package provides a flexible, configuration-driven graph editor built with React and JointJS. It enables users to create, edit, and visualize complex graphs through a modular architecture.

## Commands
Use the following commands as needed to work with the graph editor package:
- `npm install`: Install dependencies (use npm, not pnpm)
- `npm run build`: Type-check and build the package for production
- `npm run lint`: Lint the codebase
- `npm run test`: Run unit tests
- `cd ~/Apps/dna/packages/pa-graph`: Change directory to the package location

Do not use the following commands:
- `npm run dev`: I will be running the app in the background.
- `npm run preview`: Preview is not necessary as I will be running the app.

## Foundation
See the main README.md for foundational details. Add any foundational docs to the /docs folder. 

## Features
For each feature, refer to the relevant documentation in the /docs folder.
